message:
Running command: # Global routing overflow ~144 with 0.74% overflowed tiles.
# The detailed router (DRT) will handle remaining congestion.
# Monitor the next steps - IO placement, detailed placement, global routing
sleep 60
ps -p $(cat /tmp/pnr_gpl.pid) -o pid,stat,pcpu,etime --no-header 2>/dev/null || echo "Process ended"
ls /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v2/ | sort -V | tail -8
tail -6 /tmp/pnr_gpl.log
